I have all the information needed. Here's the breakdown:

- **`orbit-tools/src/builtin/{git,orbit,github,fs,time,proc,net}/mod.rs`**: each takes a `&mut ToolRegistry` parameter and calls `registry.register(...)` on it — these are the bulk of the call-sites.
